insurers.name: Bupa Arabia for Cooperative Insurance
insurers.description: Largest health insurer in Saudi Arabia. Joint venture between Bupa Group and Nazer Group.

insurers.name: The Company for Cooperative Insurance (Tawuniya)
insurers.description: Saudi Arabia's oldest and largest overall insurance company. Government-backed cooperative.

insurers.name: Mediterranean & Gulf Insurance and Reinsurance (MedGulf)
insurers.description: Major Saudi insurer with strong presence in health and motor insurance for SMEs.

insurers.name: AXA Cooperative Insurance Company
insurers.description: Saudi cooperative insurer backed by AXA Group. Full-range insurance products.

insurers.name: Walaa Cooperative Insurance Company
insurers.description: Growing cooperative insurer with competitive pricing in health and motor.

insurers.name: Gulf Union Cooperative Insurance Company
insurers.description: Saudi cooperative insurer focused on corporate group health and motor.

insurers.name: Saudi Arabian Cooperative Insurance Company (SAICO)
insurers.description: Established Saudi cooperative insurer offering health, life, and motor products.

insurers.name: Malath Cooperative Insurance Company
insurers.description: Saudi cooperative insurer with focus on health insurance.

insurers.name: Al Rajhi Company for Cooperative Insurance (Al Rajhi Takaful)
insurers.description: Takaful insurer backed by Al Rajhi Banking Group. Shariah-compliant products.

insurers.name: Al Alamiya for Cooperative Insurance (RSA Saudi)
insurers.description: Saudi cooperative insurer with RSA Group partnership, strong in motor.

insurers.name: Solidarity Saudi Takaful
insurers.description: Takaful insurer part of the Bahrain-based Solidarity Group.

insurers.name: Allianz Saudi Fransi Cooperative Insurance
insurers.description: Cooperative insurer backed by Allianz Group and Banque Saudi Fransi.

insurers.name: Saudi Arabian General Insurance (SAGR)
insurers.description: Saudi cooperative insurer focused on motor and property insurance.

insurers.name: Allied Cooperative Insurance Group (ACIG)
insurers.description: Jeddah-based cooperative insurer with diversified product line.

insurers.name: Chubb Arabia Cooperative Insurance
insurers.description: Saudi cooperative insurer backed by Chubb Limited.
